metadata.description: Sentinel Scheduled Analytics Rule — Mass resource deletion in Azure subscription. MITRE Impact (T1485). Fires when a single caller deletes 5+ resources within 5 minutes — common ransomware / destructive-attack pattern post-credential-compromise.

properties.description: Detects 5+ successful delete operations from a single caller within a 5-minute window.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationNameValue endswith "/delete"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| summarize DeleteCount = count(), DeletedResources = make_set(ResourceId, 10) by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where DeleteCount >= 5
